title: gastrochilus distichus
intro: Gastrochilus distichus, also known as the two-leafed orchid, is a plant species belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and cough. Gastrochilus distichus can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations like powder, oil, and paste, which are used to treat various health conditions.
